arts.ttl: How many games will William Saliba miss? Defender sent off against Bournemouth before pivotal title showdown with Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back William Saliba will miss his side's clash against Liverpool next Sunday after being sent off against Bournemouth on October 19.

arts.ttl: Arsenal dealt huge setback ahead of crucial Liverpool game
arts.sum: Arsenal have suffered a self-inflicted blow ahead of next week’s important Premier League meeting with Liverpool. William Saliba saw red in the first half of Saturday’s encounter with Bournemouth after bringing down Evanilson as he was bearing down on goal. arts.ttl: BREAKING: William Saliba sent off after VAR check with Arsenal star to miss Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba was initially shown a yellow card for a foul on Bournemouth striker Evanilson but the French defender was then sent off after the incident was checked by VAR
